title: matelea stapeliiflora
intro: Matelea stapeliiflora is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the dogbane or milkweed family. The plant is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, and its medicinal properties have been used in traditional medicine for various health benefits. Matelea stapeliiflora is known to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce pain and inflammation, and protect against cell damage. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used in topical preparations, such as creams or ointments, to harness its medicinal benefits.
